Description:
Stylish Fully-Furnished Studio Apartment in Avondale – Modern Comfort, Ultimate Convenience

43x Studios are now available at 7 Layard St, Avondale!

**Furnishings Provided**

Experience the best of city fringe living in these well presented, nearly-new furnished studio apartments, thoughtfully designed for those who value both comfort and lifestyle.
Ideal for singles, students, or busy professionals, this contemporary space puts you in the heart of vibrant Avondale.

**Why You’ll Love Living Here:**

Bright, colourful interiors with quality furnishings throughout
Spacious open-plan living – light-filled and inviting
Fully equipped kitchen with premium appliances
Bedroom and lounge furniture included!
Easy-care bathroom with separate toilet
Secure building with individual floor access, extensive CCTV coverage & gated entry
Onsite carpark available for just $15 per week

**Exclusive Resident Amenities:**

Welcoming foyer for you and your guests
Onsite laundry facilities for your convenience - or go to one of the three local laundomats
Secure bicycle storage
Lift access and main stairwell

Perfectly positioned in a sought-after city-fringe location, this modern apartment complex is just 100 metres from the Avondale Train Station, making your daily commute effortless. Avondale Primary School sits just over the fence, and you’re within easy walking distance to local shops, cafés, healthcare facilities, public transport, and beautiful green parks – everything you need, right at your doorstep.

Move in costs:
2 weeks' rent in advance
Bond - 4 weeks rent

We have a range of studios to choose from - yellow or blue-themed interiors, across four levels – ground-floor units feature private courtyards, while upper levels offer elevated views. All are approx 50–57m².

On-site parking is also available for just $15 per week (conditions apply).

Book in for a viewing through our website:
https://www.barfoot.co.nz/branches/royal-heights?tab=ForRent
